# networkR

`networkR` is an R package scaffold for configurable Bayesian network
analysis in factorial and repeated-measures studies. I intend to extend
this to gaussian copulas/other graphical models, but for now, just
Bayesian networks.

## Current scope

- YAML or programmatic configuration
- Panel ingestion from `data_sheets/`
- Derived design variables
- MICE predictive mean matching imputation
- Hartemink discretization with fallback handling
- Tier-aware blacklist construction
- Bootstrap Bayesian network fitting with `bnlearn`
- `ggraph(layout = "fr")` network plotting with a `strength.plot()`
  fallback path
- CI scaffolding, test scaffolding, and pkgdown scaffolding

## Quick start

``` r
library(networkR)

configuration <- ParseConfiguration("inst/example_configuration.yml")
analysisResult <- RunPipeline(configuration)

analysisResult$plotObjects$fullModel
```

## Status

This repository now contains the package foundation. The remaining work
is to fill out more of the specialized analyses from the R Markdown
document, including joint paired-tissue modeling, mediation workflows,
and correlation reporting.

# Package index

## Package

- [`networkR-package`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/networkR-package.md)
  [`networkR`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/networkR-package.md)
  : networkR: Flexible Bayesian Network Pipelines

## Configuration

- [`BuildConfiguration()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/ConfigurationFunctions.md)
  [`ParseConfiguration()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/ConfigurationFunctions.md)
  [`ValidateConfiguration()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/ConfigurationFunctions.md)
  : Configuration helpers

## Data Preparation

- [`ReadPanels()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/DataFunctions.md)
  [`AddDerivedVariables()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/DataFunctions.md)
  [`ImputeMeasurements()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/DataFunctions.md)
  [`DiscretizeMeasurements()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/DataFunctions.md)
  : Data preparation helpers

## Network Analysis

- [`BuildBlacklist()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/AnalysisFunctions.md)
  [`LearnBayesianNetwork()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/AnalysisFunctions.md)
  [`CompareStructures()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/AnalysisFunctions.md)
  : Bayesian network analysis helpers
- [`PlotBayesianNetwork()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/PlotFunctions.md)
  [`SavePlot()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/PlotFunctions.md)
  : Plot Bayesian network results
- [`RunPipeline()`](https://gwmcelfresh.github.io/networkR/reference/RunPipeline.md)
  : Run the networkR analysis pipeline
